# Adjacent SSOT Contracts

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/workspacenativeconfigdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to native config manifest](../native-config-manifest.md)

| Adjacent context | C6 receives / supplies |
| --- | --- |
| C7 Security / Policy | Receives protected path, sandbox, native config plan, and MCP allowlist decisions; supplies `NativeConfigInjected` evidence. |
| C4 Provider Runtime / Adapter | Supplies workdir path, native config copy, and `NativeConfigVersion`; adapters do not create workdirs directly. |
| C5 Runtime Scheduling | Receives claimed task `runID`, `RuntimeID`, and `CapabilityFingerprint`; supplies `WorkspacePrepared` as a precondition for provider start. |
| C2 IR Event Log | Produces Cat E workspace/config drafts through EventIngestor only; public `riido-contracts` owns event schema. |
| C8 Validation | Supplies base/final state, diffs, and artifacts for read-only validation. |
| C9 Locking | Receives concrete lock primitives used by the domain lock policy. |
| Container / VM manager | Supplies host-side run root and manifest; platform/runtime launcher owns mount or VM lifecycle. |
